outcome_summary: Nineteenth and FINAL routine fire of T-SEED-QA. Shard 19: C1 0/27 defective (0.0%) ‚Äî 24 Sound, 3 Defensible (E-03 expression_theory_art‚Üíexpression_in_art theory-introduces-its-central-concept; E-07 semantic_externalism‚Üítwin_earth position‚Üícanonical-motivating-thought-experiment, NEW sub-shape; E-18 bivalence_principle‚Üívalidity_logical inverted-classical-pedagogy), 0 Reversed, 0 Weak-redundant. C2 0/20 fail. C3 0/20 fail. FOURTEENTH 0-defect shard; TENTH consecutive quadruple-0 (10‚Äì19), longest 0-defect run in the census closes the 19-shard scoring phase. Three audit-touched edges all via inline `evidence` (E-20 propositional_attitude‚Üímotivational_internalism per S-0122, E-23 philosophy_of_mind‚Üíphenomenology per S-0155 orphan_leaf resolution, E-27 abstract_object‚Üípossible_worlds per S-0122). Workflow now hardened across SEVEN consecutive shards (13‚Äì19): inline `evidence` is necessary-and-sufficient gold signal; SQA-20 can retire the proximity heuristic. Three Defensibles STRUCTURALLY DISTINCT (NOT a uniform cluster) ‚Äî implication for SQA-20: enumerate Defensible sub-shapes as taxonomy (framework‚Üíconcept, canonical-direction-inversion / 0064 retain-with-annotation, co-fundamental-category, specific‚Üíbroader inversion, theory‚Üícentral-concept, position‚Üícanonical-motivating-thought-experiment, inverted-classical-pedagogy). Three within-shard structural features: foil-for-rejection/objection THREE-edge cluster across three sub-domains (E-06 service + E-13 mind + E-16 ethics); reference‚Üíexternalism‚ÜíTwin-Earth language chain; mind-body NODE cluster (N-03/N-16/N-09/N-01/N-18). Three borderline-PASS C3 calls held per established anchors (N-01 structural-shape gloss, N-16 Latin-decorative-English-load-bearing, N-17 puzzle-stated-before-jargon). Cumulative C1 across 01‚Äì19 = 23/515 = 4.47% ‚Äî down from 4.71%, materially below the 13% production-audit baseline. Routine batch defectives all concentrated in first NINE shards (01‚Äì09: 6/217 = 2.8%); shards 10‚Äì19 = ZERO/298. C2 and C3 cumulative across 19 shards = 0/380 nodes each. **The 19-shard scoring phase of the census closes here.** SQA-20 (closeout aggregation) is the only remaining task.
